'''Spane Covis''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served with the [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] as a sentinel. He was stationed at [[Port Tower One]] on [[Level 88]], in the [[Corellian Sector (Nar Shaddaa)/Legends|Corellian Sector]] of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], one of the [[Moon/Legends|moons]] of [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

==Biography==
One of his functions included keeping an eye out for [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] activity that might compromise the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion's]] efforts in the warehouse district of the lunar ecumenopolis. Shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Spane noticed two camouflaged freighters landing near the port. He immediately realized that something was amiss and alerted his allies in the Rebel Alliance—in actuality the freighters were Imperial [[Gamma-class assault shuttle/Legends|''Gamma''-class assault shuttles]]. The shuttles opened fire on the warehouse district, destroying stockpiles of munitions that the Rebels had been storing there.<ref name="AHF" />

==Behind the scenes==
In the printed version of ''A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale'', Spane Covis's Rebel SpecForce call sign was [[Dewback (call sign)|''Dewback'']]. However, in the [[Star Wars comic books|webstrip]] version, Spane Covis's dialogue is divided between two characters: a [[Human/Legends|Human]] whose name is not directly stated, and a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] who uses the callsign "Dewback".
